meta.note: Week of April 7 — leftovers featured early in the week; long run Sunday; hit protein at every meal and finish dinner 2.5–3 hrs before bed.

monday.label: Monday

exercises.name: Full OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Heart rate zone training. Push during all-out intervals — this is your primary fat-burn session.

exercises.name: Focus: Treadmill Sprints
exercises.cue: Max effort on all-out pushes. Recover fully during base paces.

exercises.name: Focus: Rower Intervals
exercises.cue: Drive with legs first, then hinge back, then pull arms. Full power on each stroke.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 3 eggs scrambled with spinach, bell pepper, garlic
1 cup plain 0% Greek yogurt with blueberries + 1 tsp honey
Coffee — eat first, not on empty stomach

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Quinoa + romaine + cucumber + shredded carrots + feta
Olive oil & herb dressing (parsley, dill, garlic)

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz baked salmon with fresh dill, parsley, garlic

monday.recovery: Ice sore areas + full stretch routine

tuesday.label: Tuesday

exercises.name: Med Ball Goblet Squat (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Hold med ball at chest, chest up, knees tracking over toes. Sit back into the squat.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges (10 lb dumbbells)
exercises.cue: Step long, 90-degree knee angle. Torso upright. Great for running strength.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Glute Bridge
exercises.cue: Band above knees, drive through heels, full hip extension at top. Squeeze glutes hard.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust (off couch/bed)
exercises.cue: Upper back on surface, drive through heel, full hip extension. Glute isolation.

exercises.name: Med Ball Sumo Squat (20 lbs)
exercises.cue: Wide stance, toes out, hold med ball low. Targets inner thighs and glutes.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Clamshell
exercises.cue: Band above knees, side-lying. Open like a clamshell. Fires hip abductors — protects knees during runs.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raises
exercises.cue: Full range of motion. Pause at top. Reduces calf tightness from long shifts and running.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup rolled oats cooked in water or almond milk

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: 1 can tuna in water, mixed with plain Greek yogurt + celery + Dijon mustard + fresh dill

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: ½ cup plain Greek yogurt spread on parchment

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe: Sliced Rib Roast with Roasted Asparagus
ingredients: 4 oz sliced leftover rib roast (reheated gently)
Roasted asparagus with olive oil + garlic + fresh thyme

tuesday.recovery: Full stretch routine — lower body + hamstring focus

wednesday.label: Wednesday

exercises.name: Outdoor Run — Easy-Moderate Pace
exercises.cue: Natural hill variation. Aerobic base building. Comfortable conversational pace.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.cue: After run — kneeling lunge, tuck pelvis, lean forward. Counters hospital standing.

exercises.name: Calf & Achilles Stretch
exercises.cue: Hands on wall, straight-knee then bent-knee version. Prevents shin splints.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 3 eggs scrambled with spinach + bell pepper + garlic

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Diced cucumber + shredded purple cabbage + edamame

meals.name: Dinner
meals.note: Enjoy! Aim for grilled proteins + veggies. Finish eating 2.5–3 hrs before bed.
ingredients: Choose grilled fish, chicken, or turkey
Avoid heavy cream sauces and fried items
Skip the bread basket if possible
Still water or herbal tea over sparkling

wednesday.recovery: Full stretch routine — calf & hamstring focus

thursday.label: Thursday

exercises.name: Full OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Heart rate zone training. Push during all-out intervals.

exercises.name: Focus: Treadmill Sprints
exercises.cue: Max effort on all-out pushes. Recover fully during base paces.

exercises.name: Focus: Rower Intervals
exercises.cue: Drive with legs first, then hinge back, then pull arms. Full power on each stroke.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 1 scoop protein powder + 1 cup almond milk
½ frozen banana + 1 tbsp almond butter + ½ cup spinach
Ginger tea instead of extra coffee

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Side of hummus + fresh parsley garnish

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe: Butternut Squash Ravioli with Wilted Spinach
ingredients: 1 serving prepackaged butternut squash ravioli (boil per package)
Toss with 1 tsp olive oil + 1 clove garlic (sautéed) + fresh sage
Handful of fresh spinach wilted in the pan
3 oz grilled turkey breast on the side

thursday.recovery: Ice sore areas + stretch routine + Epsom salt bath if available

friday.label: Friday

exercises.name: Swim Workout 1 — Aerobic Endurance
exercises.cue: Steady-state aerobic effort. Heart rate 60–70% max. Excellent fat oxidation.

exercises.name: OR Swim Workout 2 — HIIT Swim
exercises.cue: High-intensity intervals. 75–85% max HR during work sets. Do on good energy days only.

exercises.name: 5-Min Float Recovery
exercises.cue: Float on back after workout. Measurably reduces cortisol. Your nervous system reset.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup cottage cheese blended smooth + 2 eggs + ¼ cup oats + ½ tsp cinnamon + vanilla
Top with fresh berries + 1 tsp maple syrup

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Mixed greens + chickpeas + cucumber + shredded carrots
Sunflower seeds + olive oil + fresh parsley + herbs

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: ½ cup frozen pineapple chunks (leftover — small portions, reflux-safe)

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz ground turkey cooked with garlic + ginger + low-sodium soy sauce + shredded carrots

friday.recovery: Heat on tight areas (day 2 DOMS) + stretch routine

saturday.label: Saturday

exercises.name: Hospital NEAT — Brisk Walking
exercises.cue: Walk with purpose during rounds. Stairs over elevator every time.

exercises.name: Calf Raises at Nurses' Station
exercises.cue: Zero equipment, zero time cost. Adds up to 100+ extra cal burned.

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
exercises.cue: Any 2-min break. Lowers cortisol acutely and soothes GI tract.

exercises.name: Shoulder Rolls + Chest Opener
exercises.cue: Counters forward posture from charting. Set a reminder.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup Greek yogurt with raspberries + drizzle of honey

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: 1 can tuna in water, mixed with plain Greek yogurt + celery + Dijon mustard + fresh dill

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: One small piece of your favorite treat — cookie, chocolate, or bakery item
Enjoy mindfully mid-afternoon, not at bedtime

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 4 oz boneless skinless chicken thighs marinated in olive oil + garlic + fresh herbs
Fennel tea after dinner for digestion

saturday.recovery: Full lymphatic drainage + leg elevation after long shift

sunday.label: Sunday

exercises.name: Long Slow Run — Easy Pace
exercises.cue: Comfortable conversational pace. This is your deload-style long run — aerobic base and fat oxidation. No sprints today.

exercises.name: Post-Run Walk (5 min cool-down)
exercises.cue: Gradually lower heart rate before stopping. Prevents blood pooling in legs.

exercises.name: Full Stretch Routine
exercises.cue: Figure-4 hip stretch, hamstring, calf, IT band, pigeon. All lower body. Muscles are warm — hold each 30–45 sec.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 2 poached eggs on whole grain toast
¼ avocado + sliced cucumber + fresh dill

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Red lentils + spinach + carrots + celery + garlic
1 slice whole grain bread + thin almond butter

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe: Grilled Chicken Thighs with Farro & Zucchini
meals.note: Finish 2.5–3 hrs before bed. Fennel tea after dinner.
ingredients: 4 oz boneless skinless chicken thighs marinated in olive oil + garlic + fresh herbs + tiny splash ACV
Fennel tea after dinner for digestion

sunday.recovery: Full lymphatic drainage + stretch + restorative swim or yoga if energy allows
